warheads.name: TN-75 SLBM warhead
warheads.description: Warhead for M51 SLBM. Estimated 100 kt per RV. MIRV capable (6 warheads per missile).

warheads.name: TNA ASMP-A warhead
warheads.description: Air-sol moyenne portée amélioré warhead. Estimated 300 kt. For airborne component of deterrent.

delivery_systems.name: M51.3 SLBM
delivery_systems.description: French SLBM on Le Triomphant-class SSBN. 4 boats × 16 tubes. M51.3 variant deployed ~2025.

delivery_systems.name: ASMP-A (Air-Sol Moyenne Portée Amélioré)
delivery_systems.description: Nuclear air-launched cruise missile. Mach 3 terminal. Carried by Rafale F3-R and Mirage 2000N. 54 operational.

delivery_systems.name: Rafale F3-R
delivery_systems.description: Dual-capable fighter-bomber. Nuclear role via ASMP-A. Based at Saint-Dizier and Istres. Carrier-capable variant too.

delivery_systems.name: ASN4G Hypersonic ALCM
delivery_systems.description: Hypersonic successor to ASMP-A. Under development. Planned Mach 5+ scramjet-powered cruise missile.
